projects.name: WXATA
projects.desc: A high-performance WhatsApp automation platform built with Baileys and Bun. It includes interactive scripts, permissions management, and a live web dashboard.

projects.name: Centaur Trading API
projects.desc: An API-key protected market intelligence and trading platform with data download, model lifecycle, strategy backtesting, and owner-only admin controls.

projects.name: ServerMonitor
projects.desc: A lightweight ICTRD API monitor with a Typer CLI, colored terminal output, retries, and pytest-based tests.

projects.name: Brazilian Retail Intelligence System (BRIS)
projects.desc: A comprehensive end-to-end data engineering and BI platform with dual-environment ETL, synthetic data generation, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL/Supabase, and React dashboard.

projects.name: Signal and Noise in Financial News Sentiment: An Empirical Investigation
projects.desc: An investigation into sentiment modeling for financial text using transformer models, examining signal stability, confidence calibration, failure modes, and evaluation methodology under realistic constraints.
